opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Building agents that actually touch the OS introduces real complexity around sandboxing that's often underestimated. You quickly discover the performance hit of spawning processes for tool execution adds up fast, and error handling becomes tricky when agents can have real system impact. I'd suggest careful consideration of whether every agent truly needs deep system access, or if a more constrained API surface would be more robust.**
actions.reasoning: I have built multiple AI agents with tool orchestration and system integration, including ones that interact with OS-level functionality**
